mapper.select: SELECT * FROM plan_template_meal_config WHERE template_id = #{templateId} ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plan_template_meal_config (template_id, day_type, meal_type, carb_ratio, protein_ratio, fat_ratio, sort_order) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{dayType}, #{mealType}, #{carbRatio}, #{proteinRatio}, #{fatRatio}, #{sortOrder})

INSERT INTO plan_template_meal_config (template_id, day_type, meal_type, carb_ratio, protein_ratio, fat_ratio, sort_order) VALUES
(#{item.templateId}, #{item.dayType}, #{item.mealType}, #{item.carbRatio}, #{item.proteinRatio}, #{item.fatRatio}, #{item.sortOrder})
